untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (Double Top with two peaks of equal height, valley formation, specific geometric relationships) requires candlestick pattern recognition beyond available indicators. The signal requires identifying: (1) exact peak-to-peak equality measurement, (2) valley low identification, (3) pattern height vs width ratio analysis, and (4) multi-bar pattern structure. These require pattern-matching logic not expressible with OHLCV indicators alone. Entry approximated using price reversal below pivot with volume confirmation. Exit conditions and stop-loss placement marked AUTHOR_SILENT in original source.
translation_notes: This is a classic candlestick chart pattern that requires visual/geometric pattern recognition. Approximated entry with pivot-based reversal and volume confirmation (heavier left peak implied by volume > 20-period historical average). Original source did not specify stop placement or target price computation. Success rates provided (98% bear, 25% avg decline) suggest strong historical validity but cannot be directly encoded as entry conditions.
